headline: Why Kenvue Inc. (KVUE) is One of the Best Cheap Stocks to Buy Under $20
summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) is one of the best cheap stocks to buy under $20. Citi cut the price target on Kenvue Inc. (NYSE:KVUE) to $19 from $20 on April 15, maintaining a Neutral rating on the shares and adjusting targets in the beverages, household, and personal care group as part of a fiscal Q1 preview. […]
